abstract.t: This document provides an architectural overview of the Secured Digital Lifecycle Protocol (SDLP). SDLP defines a structured model for representing, identifying, tracking, and securing digital objects across their entire lifecycle. This overview describes the SDLP object model, the relationship between SDLP identity, lineage, lifecycle, and security architecture, and the rationale for distributing SDLP into multiple coordinated specifications. This document serves as the entry point for readers and reviewers seeking to understand the SDLP framework as a whole.
